events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: crew proposes shortcut for panelboard installation & makeup, submittal omits product listing page and project note that would decide whether shortcut allowed. Stage in-progress. Need choose practical compliant course. Since submittal missing listing page and project note, cannot verify shortcut is allowed; under codes, panelboards must be listed and installed per listing and manufacturer instructions (NEC 110.3(B), 408). Working clearances 110.26. Neutral conductors 200.4. Decision likely needs_more_info because missing documentation to approve shortcut. But if dangerous/non-compliant? The shortcut may be non-compliant but we don't know. The task says choose practical compliant course given field constraints. Since submittal omits product listing page and project note that would decide whether shortcut allowed here, we should require documentation before proceeding. Decision needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium or high? If shortcut proceeds without verification, risk high of non-compliance/rework. But currently in-progress, no flagged conditions. Could be medium. Work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 50. Findings: submittal incomplete; product listing and project note missing; shortcut cannot be validated. Actions: stop/hold shortcut until listing page and project note provided and reviewed; verify panelboard listing, working clearances, neutral installation per NEC. References: NEC 110.3(B), 110.26, 200.4, Art. 408. Need include component_conditions maybe empty list? Scenario says none flagged — judge from evidence. There is no evidence of installed-defective etc. So empty list. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list. workable empty list. confidence maybe 0.85. event_time 0. rate 0.

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":{"decision":"needs_more_info","risk":"high","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":[],"percent_complete":50,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.85,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Submittal is incomplete: product listing page and project note are missing.","The proposed shortcut cannot be verified as permitted for this panelboard/installation.","Proceeding without the listing and project-specific note risks violating NEC listing/use requirements and could create rework or safety issues."],"actions":["Hold the proposed shortcut until the missing product listing page and project note are submitted and reviewed.","Verify the panelboard is listed/labeled for the intended configuration and installation conditions per the manufacturer’s instructions.","Confirm working clearances per NEC 110.26 before finalizing placement/makeup.","Verify neutral conductor installation/separation requirements per NEC 200.4 and Art. 408."],"rationale":"A shortcut cannot be approved when the documentation needed to confirm it is code-compliant and listing-allowed is absent. The safe, compliant course is to stop and obtain the missing submittal information before the work proceeds.","references":["NEC 110.3(B)","NEC Art. 408","NEC 110.26","NEC 200.4"]}}
